question: What is Falcon 4 Pro and how does it work?
answer: Falcon 4 Pro is a professional diode laser hair removal device with FDA 510(k) clinical clearance, featuring AI-supported 4-wavelength hybrid technology in a single applicator. It effectively targets different tissue depths and hair types in a single session — from fair to dark skin, fine to coarse hair. Mr. Falcon Beauty serves you with this device at Şişli and Halkalı branches.
